title: Diplolepis nummulariifolia
taxonomy: Diplolepis nummulariifolia is classified within the plant family Cynipidae, which is a family of gall wasps. It belongs to the genus Diplolepis and is a species of gall wasp. Gall wasps are small insects that induce the formation of plant galls, which are abnormal growths on plant tissues. As a species of gall wasp, Diplolepis nummulariifolia is closely related to other gall wasp species within the Cynipidae family. The classification of Diplolepis nummulariifolia is a result of ongoing research in the field of entomology.
